moments.author: Belgian Red Devils (Belgium Men's National Team)
moments.why: A savage post mocking FIFA and Trump after Belgium’s 4‑1 rout of the US—symbolizing backlash over the red‑card reversal.
moments.url: Sports Yahoo coverage of Belgium trolls USA, FIFA, Donald Trump after dominant World Cup win

moments.author: Donald Trump
moments.quote: Thank you to FIFA for doing what was right, and reversing a great injustice!
moments.why: Trump openly claimed credit for influencing FIFA to overturn Balogun’s red card—sparking outrage over political meddling.
moments.url: Axios report on Trump calling FIFA to reverse Balogun’s red card

moments.author: Lamine Yamal
moments.quote: His little brother celebrating Spain’s third goal went instantly viral—Keyne is a star.
moments.why: A heart‑melting moment as Yamal’s toddler brother Keyne’s ecstatic celebration became a global viral sensation.
moments.url: FIFA.com ‘Yamal on Spain progress and his brother’s viral reaction’

moments.author: World Cup Social Buzz (Euronews Culture)
moments.quote: ‘Trump card’ memes exploded after FIFA lifted Balogun’s red card following Trump’s call.
moments.why: The phrase ‘Trump card’ became the defining meme of the tournament, encapsulating the scandal in one viral tag.
moments.url: Euronews Culture roundup of the 10 biggest viral moments of the World Cup 2026
